title: lichen_l2_enable re-init path lacks mutex acquisition order comment
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:380-402 (lichen_l2_enable enable path) and lines 440-445 (disable path)

Risk: Both paths acquire tx_mutex then rx_mutex (correct ordering), but a contributor adding new code might not notice this invariant. The comment at line 383 mentions lock order for deadlock avoidance, but:
1. The ordering rule is not documented in the header file
2. A maintainer adding a third mutex or changing the L2 input path might introduce deadlock

Pattern a contributor will copy incorrectly: Adding mutex acquisition in new code without following the established tx_mutex-before-rx_mutex order.

Suggested fix: Add a module-level comment block defining the lock ordering invariant at the top of the file where tx_mutex and rx_mutex are defined (around lines 176-180).
close_reason: Fixed: Added explicit LOCK ORDER comment documenting tx_mutex before rx_mutex
